description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 9th; Slot shoulders; Price 10,800 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Once per day on command, this bright red and gold cape allows the wearer to use the magic of the dimension door spell. When he disappears, he leaves behind a cloud of harmless gray smoke, appearing in a similar fashion at his destination. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, dimension door; Cost 5,400 gp.
